req.title: Submit leave request — variant 3
req.statement: A full-time employee shall be able to submit a leave request for between 1 and 30 business days; requests spanning more than 30 days require hr-admin approval. Additionally, the action must emit a webhook event for external consumers.
error_pathways: 422 when request exceeds 30 days without hr-admin

doc.reasoning: The requirement defines five distinct test-worthy dimensions: (1) valid leave submission within 1-30 days (EP positive path), (2) the exact 30-day boundary (BVA), (3) exceeding 30 days without hr-admin role (NEG/DT 422 path), (4) start_date > end_date (NEG 400 path), (5) overlapping leave (NEG 409 path), and (6) webhook emission on success (STC side-effect). I selected five tests to cover all mandated error pathways plus one strong positive and one boundary, satisfying the minimum three while achieving meaningful decision-table coverage. Each test is scoped to the UI layer via Playwright but validates backend state through a lightweight API assertion helper to remain deterministic.

tests.name: test_submit_leave_request_valid_15_days
preconditions: User is authenticated as a full-time employee
No existing leave overlapping the target date range
Webhook listener is primed via <fixture: webhook_sink>
actions: Fill start_date with a Monday 4 weeks from today
Fill end_date with start_date + 14 business days (15-day request)
Capture the created leave request ID from the confirmation banner
expected: HTTP 201 / success banner visible on screen
Leave record exists in backend with status='pending'
Webhook event 'leave_request.created' fired with correct payload
tests.executable:
import pytest
from playwright.sync_api import Page

def test_submit_leave_request_valid_15_days(
    page: Page,
    auth_full_time_employee,
    webhook_sink,
    api_client,
    business_date_range,
    email_stub,
):
    start, end = business_date_range(days=15)
    page.goto("/leave-requests/new")
    page.fill("[data-testid='start-date']", start)
    page.fill("[data-testid='end-date']", end)
    page.click("[data-testid='submit-btn']")

    banner = page.locator("[data-testid='success-banner']")
    banner.wait_for(state="visible", timeout=5000)
    leave_id = banner.get_attribute("data-leave-id")

    record = api_client.get(f"/api/leave-requests/{leave_id}").json()
    assert record["status"] == "pending"
    assert record["duration_days"] == 15

    assert email_stub.received_for(auth_full_time_employee.manager_email)
    event = webhook_sink.latest_event("leave_request.created")
    assert event is not None
    assert event["payload"]["leave_id"] == leave_id

tests.name: test_submit_leave_request_exactly_30_days_boundary
preconditions: User is authenticated as a full-time employee
No existing leave overlapping the target date range
Webhook listener is primed via <fixture: webhook_sink>
actions: Fill start_date and end_date such that the span equals exactly 30 business days
expected: No hr-admin approval step shown in UI
trace: R-WEB-059: upper boundary — 30 days requires NO hr-admin approval
tests.executable:
import pytest
from playwright.sync_api import Page

def test_submit_leave_request_exactly_30_days_boundary(
    page: Page,
    auth_full_time_employee,
    webhook_sink,
    api_client,
    business_date_range,
):
    start, end = business_date_range(days=30)
    page.goto("/leave-requests/new")
    page.fill("[data-testid='start-date']", start)
    page.fill("[data-testid='end-date']", end)
    page.click("[data-testid='submit-btn']")

    banner = page.locator("[data-testid='success-banner']")
    banner.wait_for(state="visible", timeout=5000)
    leave_id = banner.get_attribute("data-leave-id")

    assert page.locator("[data-testid='hradmin-approval-notice']").count() == 0

    record = api_client.get(f"/api/leave-requests/{leave_id}").json()
    assert record["duration_days"] == 30
    assert record["status"] == "pending"

    event = webhook_sink.latest_event("leave_request.created")
    assert event is not None

tests.name: test_submit_leave_request_31_days_without_hradmin_returns_422
preconditions: User is authenticated as a full-time employee (NOT hr-admin)
No existing leave overlapping the target date range
actions: Fill start_date and end_date spanning exactly 31 business days
expected: Form submission rejected — error banner visible
Error message references hr-admin approval requirement
No leave record created in backend (404 on lookup)
trace: R-WEB-059: 422 when request exceeds 30 days without hr-admin
R-WEB-059: webhook must NOT fire on rejected request
tests.executable:
import pytest
from playwright.sync_api import Page

def test_submit_leave_request_31_days_without_hradmin_returns_422(
    page: Page,
    auth_full_time_employee,
    webhook_sink,
    api_client,
    business_date_range,
):
    start, end = business_date_range(days=31)
    page.goto("/leave-requests/new")
    page.fill("[data-testid='start-date']", start)
    page.fill("[data-testid='end-date']", end)
    page.click("[data-testid='submit-btn']")

    error_banner = page.locator("[data-testid='error-banner']")
    error_banner.wait_for(state="visible", timeout=5000)
    assert "hr-admin" in error_banner.inner_text().lower()

    resp = api_client.get(
        "/api/leave-requests",
        params={"start_date": start, "end_date": end,
                "employee_id": auth_full_time_employee.id}
    )
    assert resp.json()["total"] == 0

    assert webhook_sink.count_events("leave_request.created") == 0

tests.name: test_submit_leave_request_start_after_end_returns_400
preconditions: User is authenticated as a full-time employee
actions: Fill start_date with today + 10 business days
Fill end_date with today + 5 business days (end < start)
expected: Inline validation error shown on end_date field
Form does not submit (no network request to /api/leave-requests)
Error text indicates end date must be after start date
tests.executable:
import pytest
from playwright.sync_api import Page

def test_submit_leave_request_start_after_end_returns_400(
    page: Page,
    auth_full_time_employee,
    future_business_date,
):
    start = future_business_date(offset_days=10)
    end = future_business_date(offset_days=5)

    requests_made = []
    page.on("request", lambda r: requests_made.append(r.url)
            if "leave-requests" in r.url and r.method == "POST" else None)

    page.goto("/leave-requests/new")
    page.fill("[data-testid='start-date']", start)
    page.fill("[data-testid='end-date']", end)
    page.click("[data-testid='submit-btn']")

    field_error = page.locator("[data-testid='end-date-error']")
    field_error.wait_for(state="visible", timeout=3000)
    assert "after" in field_error.inner_text().lower()

    assert len(requests_made) == 0, "No POST should be issued for invalid dates"

tests.name: test_submit_leave_request_overlapping_existing_returns_409
preconditions: User is authenticated as a full-time employee
An approved leave record already exists for the employee spanning 2 weeks from next Monday
<fixture: existing_leave> seeds this record via API before the test
actions: Fill start_date and end_date overlapping the pre-existing leave record
expected: Error banner visible with 409 conflict message
No new leave record created in backend
trace: R-WEB-059: state transition — employee already in APPROVED_LEAVE state for range
tests.executable:
import pytest
from playwright.sync_api import Page

def test_submit_leave_request_overlapping_existing_returns_409(
    page: Page,
    auth_full_time_employee,
    existing_leave,
    webhook_sink,
    api_client,
):
    overlap_start = existing_leave["start_date"]
    overlap_end = existing_leave["end_date"]

    page.goto("/leave-requests/new")
    page.fill("[data-testid='start-date']", overlap_start)
    page.fill("[data-testid='end-date']", overlap_end)
    page.click("[data-testid='submit-btn']")

    error_banner = page.locator("[data-testid='error-banner']")
    error_banner.wait_for(state="visible", timeout=5000)
    text = error_banner.inner_text().lower()
    assert "overlap" in text or "conflict" in text

    resp = api_client.get(
        "/api/leave-requests",
        params={"start_date": overlap_start, "end_date": overlap_end,
                "employee_id": auth_full_time_employee.id}
    )
    assert resp.json()["total"] == 1, "Only the pre-seeded record should exist"

    assert webhook_sink.count_events("leave_request.created") == 0
